calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID WASSERAMN, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY.
RATGUNATH K. DINDIAL, ATTORNEY FOR DEFT. JAMES MASON, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

THE PARTIES PLACED A STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS:
THE DEFENDANT'S TENANCY IS TERMINATED AS OF THE END OF THE DAY ON SEPTEMBER 30,2007 FOR THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 3623 25TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. THE DEFENDANT SHALL REMOVE ALL PERSONAL PROPERTY AND POSSESSIONS FROM THE PREMISES. EACH PARTY IS TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COST. EACH PARTY MUTUALLY RELEASES THE OTHER FROM ALL CLAIMS, DEMANDS AND ACTIONS, KNOWN AND UNKNOWN, PAST OR PRESENT.THE PLAINTIFF WILL PAY THE DEFENDANT THE AMOUNT OF $10,000.00. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE AS FOLLOWS: $3,500.00 BY JULY 27, 2007, WITH THE BALANCE OF 6,500.00 PLUS THE DEFENDANT'S DEPOSIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,450.00 BEING PAID TO THE DEFENDANT ON SEPTEMBER 30, 2007. THE PLAINTIFF WILL GIVE THE DEFENDANT A LETTER OF REFERENCE, AND WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 3 DAYS OF LEAVING THE PREMISES. THE PLAINTIFF ALSO WAIVES THE RENT OWED FOR THE FOLLOWING MONTHS: JUNE, JULY, AUGUST, AND SEPTEMBER 2007.
